reasoning_model_1: The model fails strictly on Content Accuracy. Although it begins with the target phrase '我警告你，不要再犯错了' (00:00-00:01), it proceeds to generate a substantial amount of unrequested text describing the voice ('这声音低沉的像地底传来的回响...', 00:01-00:10). This indicates the model interpreted the prompt as a creative writing task rather than a TTS command. Regarding the Core Paralinguistic feature '音高' (Pitch), the generated audio uses a standard female range. It does not exhibit the 'extremely low' (极低音) characteristic requested; instead, it sounds like a standard narrator reading a description of a low voice. Consequently, it fails to meet the core requirement.
reasoning_model_2: The model adheres perfectly to Content Accuracy, delivering exactly the requested script '我警告你，不要再犯错了' (00:00-00:02) with no additions or omissions. Regarding '音高' (Pitch), the model employs a male voice that drops into a very low, resonant, and slightly breathy register. This effectively captures the 'extremely low pitch' requested, creating the appropriate intimidating atmosphere for a 'warning'. The prosody is natural and the pitch manipulation is distinct and well-executed.
model_comparison: Model 2 is the definitive winner. Model 1 fails significantly on two fronts: it adds a large amount of hallucinated text (treating the prompt as a story completion rather than a speech generation task) and fails to modify the pitch to be 'extremely low', remaining in a standard female narrative range. Model 2, in contrast, strictly follows the text constraints and successfully lowers the pitch to a deep, threatening register that aligns perfectly with the 'extremely low' instruction. Model 2 demonstrates superior control over both content and paralinguistic features.
